prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Ford Performance Hand-Built Coyote 5.0L V8 (Code: FRPP-500HP)** with forged internals, including **Manley forged pistons (2618 alloy, 11.5:1 CR)**, **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods**, and a **billet steel crankshaft** for 8,500 RPM redline capability. Pair with a **Livernois Motorsports Stage 3+ camshaft kit (236°/244° duration, 0.620" lift)** and **Ferrea Competition Series valves (intake: 1.460", exhaust: 1.220")** for aggressive overlap and +120 HP gains.

Install a **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (88mm, 44lb/min airflow)** with a **custom Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** and **Tial MV-R 50mm blow-off valve**. Use a **PTP 4.5" aluminum turbo inlet pipe** and **VMP Performance intercooler (1,250 HP core)** with **Mishimoto silicone couplers (4-ply, reinforced)**. Fuel system upgrades include **Fuelab Prodigy pump (450 LPH)**, **ID1700x injectors**, and a **Radium Engineering dual catch can setup** to prevent oil dilution.

Replace the stock **Tremec TR-9070 7-speed dual-clutch** with a **Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox (dog-ring, 6-speed)** and **PPG straight-cut gears (1st: 2.97, 2nd: 2.17, 3rd: 1.66)** for lightning-fast shifts. Add a **Tilton Super Starter (1.4kW)** and **AP Racing CP9446-8000 6-piston front brake calipers** with **DBA 5000 Series rotors (380mm, 2-piece, slotted)** for track-ready stopping power.
estetica: Fit a **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Pandem Design)** with **custom carbon fiber fenders (3.5" flares)**, **aluminum overfenders**, and **dual-canard vortex generators** for aggressive aero. Use **Aeromotions active rear wing (dual-element, 3D-printed carbon, 1,200 lbs downforce at 150 mph)** with **Gurney flaps (adjustable, 1.5")**.

Replace the stock headlights with **Morimoto XB LED projectors (Bi-Xenon, 5,500K)** and **custom sequential LED taillights (Diode Dynamics, C2 housing)**. Add **Vorsteiner V-FF 107 20" forged wheels (Front: 9.5x20 ET35, Rear: 11.5x20 ET45)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/20 front, 325/30/20 rear)** for maximum grip.

Install a **full carbon fiber interior overhaul** including **Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon shell, FIA-approved 6-point harnesses)**, **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (suede, 350mm, quick-release)**, and **custom roll cage (Chromoly, 4-point, TIG-welded)** with **Sparco harness bar**. Use **Alcantara headliner (black/red stitching)** and **custom gauge cluster (AEM CD-7 dash, 7" touchscreen, CAN bus integration)** for real-time telemetry.
